articles.title: Apple beats Q1 2026 earnings expectations on iPhone sales
articles.summary: Apple reported Q1 2026 revenue of $124B, up 8 percent year over year, beating analyst expectations. iPhone sales drove most of the growth, with strong demand in emerging markets and India.

articles.title: Apple Vision Pro 2 announced for late 2026
articles.summary: Apple announced Vision Pro 2, a lighter and cheaper version of its mixed reality headset. Launch expected Q4 2026 at $2,499. Analysts see this as Apple's renewed push into spatial computing.

articles.title: Tim Cook outlines AI strategy at developer keynote
articles.summary: CEO Tim Cook detailed Apple's expanded AI strategy, emphasizing on-device intelligence and privacy. New Apple Intelligence features will be available on all 2024 and later devices.

articles.title: EU antitrust probe into App Store practices continues
articles.summary: The European Commission opened a new investigation into Apple's App Store fees, focusing on alternative payment processors. Apple denies wrongdoing. Potential fine could reach 10 percent of global revenue.
